calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jun-26-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. BRIAN D. SUDANO, Esq. of the Sudano Law Firm (Tel: 925-849-4183) appearing via CourtCall for petitioner Symetra Assigned Benefits Service Company;
Payee HOSEA MARQUEZ SHAW appearing in pro per.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE COMPANY'S Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. The Court and Mr. Shaw discuss the transfer of structured settlement payment rights. The matter is submitted by the parties. The Court rules as follows: The petition for transfer of structured settlement payment rights is affirmed, approved, and granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice Of Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jun-16-2020 Continued To Jun-26-20 At 09:31 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE COMPANY'S Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights.

No appearances made by the parties. The Court vacates its tentative ruling. Per the agreement of the parties per their email to the court dated June 15, 2020, the hearing on petitioner's Petition for Court Approval of Transfer of Structued Settlement Payment Rights is continued to June 26, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Notice Of Petition For Court Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
